# Sagar Panda - DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure Engineer

## About
Sagar Panda is a Senior DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure Engineer. This website serves as a professional portfolio and a technical blog where Sagar shares expert tutorials on cloud infrastructure, system reliability, container orchestration, and Infrastructure as Code (IaC).

## Key Technical Domain
- Cloud Platforms: AWS (Amazon Web Services)
- Containerization & Orchestration: Kubernetes (K8s), Docker
- Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Terraform
- CI/CD & Automation: GitLab CI, Jenkins, GitHub Actions
- Configuration Management: Ansible
- OS & Scripting: Linux, Shell Scripting, Python

## Site Structure & Navigation
- Homepage: https://sagarpanda.com/
- Main Technical Blog: https://sagarpanda.com/blogs/
- AWS Architecture & Tutorials: https://sagarpanda.com/blogs/#cloud
- CI/CD Architecture & Tutorials: https://sagarpanda.com/blogs/#ci-cd
- Kubernetes Orchestration: https://sagarpanda.com/blogs/#kubernetes
- Terraform IaC: https://sagarpanda.com//blogs/#terraform/

## Notable Publications & Tutorials
- Cache Me If You Can - AWS CloudFront in Action
- Beyond Objects — Using Amazon S3 Files as a Native File System on EC2
- Automating AWS Infrastructure with Terraform
